result.summary: Found a few layout issues on this mobile page, mainly content being clipped or obscured by fixed UI elements.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the game grid, hiding the bottom row of game cards and making part of the content inaccessible.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the main content area or make the footer non-overlay so the last row can scroll fully above it.

issues.description: The game grid on the right edge is cut off, with several cards only partially visible, suggesting the layout is overflowing the viewport.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the responsive grid widths and spacing so all cards fit within the screen or become properly scrollable as a carousel.

issues.description: The top category tab row is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: Allow the tab strip to scroll horizontally cleanly or reduce tab widths so the full last tab is visible.
